trades.reasoning: Score 95 with all four bullish signals firing together — RSI at 67.8 (peak momentum zone), confirmed MACD crossover, rising histogram, and price 12% above SMA-20; strongest composite setup in today's screener.
Score 95 with RSI at 61.4 (clean midpoint of bullish zone), MACD crossover confirmed, histogram rising, and price 7% above SMA-20 — momentum well underway with room before overbought territory.
Score 95 with all four signals and RSI at 55.6 — earliest-stage momentum among the top candidates, offering the most upside runway before RSI climbs into caution territory.

decisions.briefing: Markets were essentially flat today — a quiet drift with no strong directional catalyst. With four open slots and over $500 in cash, the rules call for putting capital to work, and today's screener surfaced several clean score-95 setups. I added EOSE, AXTI, and SOFI — all showing confirmed MACD crossovers and RSI below 70 — while leaving one slot open as a buffer given the neutral tape.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities ended nearly unchanged Thursday as investors found little reason to push in either direction, with the S&P 500 off 0.1% and the NASDAQ slipping 0.2%. The session reflected a broader consolidation mood — large-cap tech offered no fresh catalyst, and volume was light with no major economic releases to drive conviction. Beneath the surface, momentum continued rotating into select mid- and small-cap names with cleaner technical setups.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週四收盤幾乎持平，投資者缺乏明確方向，標普500指數微跌0.1%，納斯達克指數下滑0.2%。盤面呈現整固格局——大型科技股無新催化劑提振，成交量清淡，市場靜待下一重要經濟數據。表面平靜之下，資金持續輪動至技術面較佳的中小型股，尋找下一波動能。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is a strategy that buys stocks already trending upward, betting the trend continues in the near term rather than mean-reverting immediately. Practitioners look for a cluster of confirming signals — MACD crossover, rising histogram, RSI between 55–70, and price above the moving average — to distinguish real momentum from noise. Today's three buys all fit this mold: not the cheapest stocks, but the ones with the strongest technical tailwinds.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動量投資是一種追蹤近期上升趨勢的策略，押注趨勢在短期內持續延伸，而非立即回落均值。實際操作上，投資者會尋找多重確認訊號的共振——MACD金叉、柱狀圖走升、RSI介於55至70之間，以及股價站穩均線之上——以區分真實動能與假突破。今日三筆買入均符合此邏輯：不追求最便宜的標的，而是選擇技術面順風最強的股票。
